rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: High fuel/energy consumption indicates efficiency losses.
suggestedActions: Regular maintenance improves overall equipment efficiency.
Simulate real-world driving conditions for accurate range estimates.

description.short: Calculate engine torque at a given power and RPM.
description.long: Calculate engine torque at a given power and RPM.

short_i18n.en: Calculate engine torque at a given power and RPM.
short_i18n.tr: Motorun belirli bir devirde urettigi dondurme momentini (Torque) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie das Motordrehmoment bei gegebener Leistung und Drehzahl.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le couple moteur à une puissance et un régime donnés.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el par motor a una potencia y RPM dadas.
short_i18n.ar: حساب عزم المحرك عند قدرة وسرعة دوران معينة.
